steps.title: Identify the goal
steps.content: The student wants to contrast the two samples — TPU (3 mm thick, ΔT = 6°C) vs. SEBS rubber (4 mm thick, ΔT = 3.5°C). A good contrast names a property where the two samples differ.

steps.title: Match the choice
steps.content:
(D) states that the SEBS sample was thicker than the TPU sample — a direct, single-sentence contrast on a measurable property.

(A) and (B) don't contrast the samples. (C) says both increased in temperature — that's a similarity, not a contrast.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
